title: SL1 4AN, KD 2 Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/JP3647JU/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: KD 2 Limited   Installation name: KLON-06   Permit number: EPR/JP3647JU/A001   "
